mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in unemployment rate above 4.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions that depress corporate earnings expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and housing starts indicates strong consumer demand, which drives corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 over any 3-year window or 60-day returns in high-demand regimes are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production below its 6-month moving average signals weakening supply chain capacity, which raises inflation expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading above 243.75 signals persistent inflation, prompting central bank inaction that erodes real equity returns and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Positive monthly payroll growth above 100k signals robust employment gains that boost consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in real sales of new homes above 1288k signals strong housing demand, which drives construction activity and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in both the federal funds rate and inflation expectations signal a dovish central bank, which drives equity valuations higher and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 over any 3-year window or 60-day returns in accommodative regimes are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).
